questions.question: According to the opening of John's Gospel, what was 'in the beginning'?
What was the name of the man sent from God to testify about the Light?
John the Baptist said he was the Christ when the priests and Levites asked him.
The next day, he saw Jesus coming to him, and said, 'Behold, the _____ of God, who takes away the sin of the world!'
He first found his own brother, Simon, and said to him, 'We have found the _____!'
